# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# Declarative configuration for Kong API Gateway

# Services
services:
  - name: microservice1
    url: http://microservice1.com
    routes:
      - path: /api/v1
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        upstreams:
          - target: http://microservice1-backend.com
            load_balancing: true
  - name: microservice2
    url: http://microservice2.com
    routes:
      - path: /api/v2
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        upstreams:
          - target: http://microservice2-backend.com
            load_balancing: true

# Upstream targets
upstreams:
  - name: microservice1-backend
    url: http://microservice1-backend.com
  - name: microservice2-backend
    url: http://microservice2-backend.com

# Load balancing configuration
load_balancing:
  - name: round_robin
    algorithm: round_robin
